productDisplayName: Park Avenue Men Red Swank Brief
description: Style NoteOne of the largest menswear Brands in India, park avenue is known for their unflinching dedication towards quality and Fit. Made from premium combed cotton and elastane fabric, this pair of briefs embody these very ideals. Its stylish waistband and double layered front pouch give you a body enhancing fit.    Product DetailsRed briefs, grey and white elasticized waistband with branding for a smooth and comfortable grip, double layered front pouch for extra support and comfort, navy blue binding at leg hole, high cut design allows free leg movement, printed branding on the inside offers abrasion-free comfort, bio-washed to soften the fabric and avoid skin irritation, branding loop at front waistbandMaterial and Care96% cotton and 4% elastaneMachine wash warmDo not ironSize and FitMid RiseThe model (height 6' waist 32'') is wearing a size M Style NoteOne of the largest menswear brands in India, Park Avenue is known for their unflinching dedication towards quality and fit.
